description: Checked-in release milestone exit evidence for Maestria v0.4 through v0.9. Each entry carries the canonical milestone-description evidence block that validates against the release-exit-evidence contract (scripts/release_exit_evidence.py). Milestone titles match the GitHub milestone names (e.g. v0.4, v0.5, v0.6). The v0.6.1 binary release is a patch under the v0.6 milestone.

milestones.summary: Local file indexing; no benchmark corpus recorded
Lexical search and evidence opening; no benchmark corpus recorded
Query-adaptive search, code intelligence, memory promotion (latest binary v0.6.1); no quality/resource/security measurements recorded
Pre-populated; requires benchmark evidence before product-complete
Pre-populated; requires benchmark evidence before product-complete
